arts.ttl: Better than the Bernabeu? How a new Man Utd stadium could take shape
arts.sum: With Manchester United set to decide on whether or not to build new stadium, BBC Sport talks to industry experts, journalists and fans to find out what a new Old Trafford could end up being like.

arts.ttl: What now for Marcus Rashford? Wantaway Man Utd star's possible destinations ranked - with move to follow Cristiano Ronaldo or Lionel Messi and shock Premier League switch among his options
arts.sum: It's a shame Marcus Rashford's Manchester United career has come to this. Following weeks of speculation that the Red Devils could move Rashford on, the man himself has come out and expressed his desire for a 'new challenge' .

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: La Liga club plot Rashford transfer
arts.sum: On Tuesday, Rashford told Henry Winter: “For me, personally, I think I’m ready for a new challenge and the next steps.” Now TBRFootball have said that Atletico are among the clubs keen on Rashford, and a loan deal has been mooted.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Manchester United score predicted as Carabao Cup fate decided
arts.sum: Manchester United face Tottenham in the Carabao Cup later today, so we simulated the game to predict what could happen.

arts.ttl: Harry Amass: What does Man United future hold amid imminent arrival of new signing
arts.sum: Manchester United’s injury problems at left-back have been well-documented over the last two years but could the solution to their issues already be at Old Trafford? Harry Amass has...

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy hints Man United made a major mistake in Ruben Amorim's coaching overhaul
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy was the interim Manchester United boss before being replaced by Ruben Amorim, who brought a host of his own coaching staff from Sporting Lisbon

arts.ttl: Manchester United could start Ruben Amorim squad rebuild earlier than expected
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been the poster boy of the Man Utd academy for years and it was once unthinkable he would be sold, but we have now entered that territory.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher admits Manchester United have a “problem” in the Marcus Rashford saga
arts.sum: Liverpool legend Jamie Carragher has said it was an easy decision for Ruben Amorim to drop Marcus Rashford from the Manchester United squad this weekend. With Rashford under-performing, Carragher feels it was not actually that big a call from Amorim to leave the 27-year-old out of his team, though he admits the club now have […] The post Jamie Carragher admits Manchester United have a “problem” in the Marcus Rashford saga appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool injury, suspension list and return dates for Tottenham: Konate, Bradley updates
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Liverpool's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash with Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: I was once linked with the Tottenham job – now I could knock them out of the Carabao Cup
arts.sum: He could have been at Tottenham...
